headline: Visa (V) Valuation Check As Share Price Swings And Premium P/E Invite Fresh Scrutiny
summary: Visa (V) continues to attract attention as investors reassess the stock after recent share price swings. The company’s scale, global transaction network and current US$321.28 share price are forming the starting point for fresh scrutiny. See our latest analysis for Visa. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 6.19% 1 month share price return contrasting with a 7.27% decline year to date. The 3 year total shareholder return of 41.99% points to stronger longer term compounding. If Visa’s moves...
